features: Whitening action: gently removes tea, coffee & food stains; brightens teeth; protects enamel; and gives a radiant white smile with safe daily use, naturally.
Value pack: with 5 x 100 ml toothpaste tubes for 500 ml total, ideal for families and long-term use, saving time and money on daily oral care routines.
Triple action: formula whitens teeth, removes stains, cleans hard-to-reach areas, eliminates plaque, and freshens breath with a long-lasting minty sensation.
Convenient size: 100 ml tube ideal for travel and home use fits easily in bags or cabinets. The easy-squeeze design ensures mess-free, simple oral care anywhere.
Daily protection: provides daily protection by removing plaque. Reducing buildup and preventing bad breath supports a cleaner, healthier mouth with regular use.
